role: This directory contains the core type definitions and data contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system, defining shared interfaces for data model, configuration, and infrastructure.
responsibility: Defines all shared interfaces and types enabling consistent data structures across mirror units (SpineUnit, SpineIdentity, etc.), project configuration (SpineConfig), language support, synchronization manifests, architectural rules, and version management. Additionally, it provides a stable public import facade for protocol types through protocol.ts, and establishes type contracts for view artifacts including architecture diagram specifications and public surface view items via view.ts.

children.role: Core type definitions and data contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system's data model, configuration, and infrastructure.
Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
